steps.title: Identify the key action
steps.content: The passage describes OSIRIS-REx's mission goal: “gathering pieces of it to bring back to Earth”. This is the defining action the blank must express.

steps.title: Apply the action to the choices
steps.content:
Collected precisely captures the idea of acquiring material from the surface to bring back to Earth. Attached suggests fastening, followed is unrelated to sampling, and replaced implies substitution—none fit the gathering mission.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
